$comment: User-level shell command guardrails. Gates gh, az, and git CLI invocations via Gate-ShellCommands.ps1 before execution. Matches the 'powershell' and 'bash' tool names (shell tools used by Copilot CLI). timeoutSec=130 accommodates popup wait (120s) + script overhead (10s). The shell gate is non-bypassable by design — there is no env-var escape hatch. Rule files: gh-guardrails.json, az-guardrails.json, and git-guardrails.json in the hooks root. Paths use env-var expansion ($env:USERPROFILE / %USERPROFILE%) for portability.

preToolUse.$comment: Gate powershell tool — covers all shell commands on Windows
Gate bash tool — covers shell commands if bash tool is used
